top_signals.title: Oil prices may hit $150 per barrel soon if Iran war continues, energy economist says - CNBC
top_signals.summary: Oil prices may hit $150 per barrel soon if Iran war continues, energy economist says  CNBC
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Indonesia Delivers Off-Cycle Rate Hike to Temper Market Rout
top_signals.summary: Indonesia’s central bank unexpectedly raised its benchmark interest rate in an off-cycle decision, seeking to shore up the rupiah after a selloff rattled the nation’s currency and bonds.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Commerce Bank
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Commerce Bank
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: We’ve died and gone to volatility heaven
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Apple's Siri AI Has Edge Over Rivals, IDC Says (Correct)
top_signals.summary: IDC Senior Research Director Nabila Popal says Apple's Siri AI holds two key advantages over other AI models: its access to personal context and strong focus on privacy and security. She also says Apple has caught up on AI strategy this year and its new features will enhance user experience. (Corrects description of AI model features.) (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: European satellite group Iceye in €1bn funding led by General Atlantic
top_signals.summary: Capital raise values Finnish-Polish group at €10bn
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: GoGold gets green light to build $227M mine in Mexico
top_signals.summary: Los Ricos South is envisioned to be a 15-year mine with the capacity to produce of 80 million oz. of payable silver-equivalent.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: EU capitals to rip apart ‘sacrificial lamb’ first draft of new bloc budget
top_signals.summary: Also in this newsletter: First discussions on proposals to reduce US tech reliance

top_signals.title: Antofagasta to spend $900M extending Zaldívar mine to 2051
top_signals.summary: The investment will replace freshwater use with treated wastewater by 2028, creating 5,000 construction jobs.
